series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with self-registration by campers, collecting camping fees, assignment of sites, and other related documents

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in electronic format. these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
